channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Judge rules Trump administration violated the First Amendment in fight against ICE-tracking
item.description: Jorge L. Alonso, a federal district court judge for the Northern District of Illinois, said that the Trump Administration violated the First Amendment when it pressured Facebook and Apple to remove ICE-tracking groups and apps. Judge Alonso granted the plaintiffs, Kassandra Rosado, who runs the ICE Sightings - Chicagoland Facebook group, and Kreisau Group, the […]...

item.title: Tunnels, objets enfouis, navigation sans GPS : cette startup dévoile ce que sa technologie quantique pourrait faire depuis l’espace
item.description: Fin mars, l'entreprise québécoise SBQuantum a franchi une étape déterminante en lançant avec succès un capteur quantique dans l'espace, dans le cadre du concours MagQuest de la National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency (NGA). Ce magnétomètre quantique à base de diamant pourrait non seulement...

item.title: I tried a new ChatGPT tool to help me find a better wedding venue — and I’m very glad it isn’t planning my big day
item.description: I just used AI to help plan my wedding — and there’s one important thing ChatGPT still can’t do.

item.title: DOJ refuses to help French authorities in criminal probe of X
item.description: The US Department of Justice is siding with X, as the social media platform owned by Elon Musk navigates a criminal investigation unfolding in France. As first reported by The Wall Street Journal, the Justice Department characterized the French probe as "an effort to entangle the United States in a politically charged criminal proceeding aimed at wrongfully regulating through prosecution the business activities of a social media platform.” France launched its investigation into X in July, accusing the platform of manipulating its algorithm and "fraudulent data extraction." Months later, French...

item.title: 'Update immediately': 60,000 WordPress websites at risk after experts discover flaw that allows hackers to create hidden admin accounts
item.description: A critical WordPress plugin flaw allows attackers to bypass authentication and gain full administrative control, exposing websites to data theft and malware attacks.

item.title: How to watch Copa del Rey final 2026: Free Streams & TV Channels for Atletico Madrid vs Real Sociedad
item.description: All the ways to watch Copa del Rey final 2026 live streams online – including for FREE – as La Cartuja in Seville hosts Atletico Madrid vs Real Sociedad.

item.title: A comet gets destroyed by the sun, data centers endanger the Potomac River, and more science news
item.description: The Artemis II astronauts are settling back into life on Earth, but we're not quite tired yet of hearing about their amazing journey. There's a new PBS documentary now streaming on YouTube that dives into the Artemis program and the latest efforts to send humans to the moon again. Also this week, NASA shared some awesome images of a comet flying into the sun, the nonprofit American Rivers released its annual report on the most endangered rivers in the US and ESA posted a throwback image of Mars to highlight some interesting changes down on the surface. Here are the science stories that caught ...

item.title: J’ai testé cette caméra 360° de SwitchBot à 80 euros et elle tient presque toutes ses promesses
item.description: La SwitchBot Pan/Tilt Cam Plus 3K aligne les arguments : image 3K, détection IA et suivi à 360°. Alléchant pour une caméra de surveillance à moins de 80 euros. Nous nous devions donc de vérifier si elle a de quoi bousculer le marché… ou non.

item.title: Cheap stuff that doesn’t suck, take 3
item.description: From fancy OLED TVs to robot vacuums with arms, we tend to cover a lot of cool stuff here at The Verge that, unfortunately, often costs as much as a month’s rent (or more). But with the ongoing tariff situation in the US and a global memory shortage pushing up the cost of, well, everything, we’re well aware that not […]

item.title: Cette barre de son JBL 5.0 compatible Dolby Atmos et DTS Virtual:X était déjà abordable, mais elle l’est encore plus avec cette remise de 38 %
item.description: Lancée l'an dernier avec quatre autres références, la JBL Bar 300MK2 est une barre de son d'entrée de gamme capable de simuler un son surround 3D pour rendre les soirées cinéma plus agréables. Actuellement, Amazon la propose à 248,99 euros au lieu de 399,99 euros.

item.title: Meta finally adds direct messages to the web version of Threads
item.description: The mobile app for Threads has had DMs for almost a year, but the web version lagged behind...until now.

item.title: 'No onboard pilot needed': Massive 2-ton VTOL “mega drone” just hauled fresh tea leaves over 75 miles autonomously
item.description: Massive 2-ton autonomous cargo drone flies 75 miles across mountains carrying fresh tea without an onboard pilot.

item.title: Anthropic’s relationship with the Trump administration seems to be thawing
item.description: Despite recently being designated a supply-chain risk by the Pentagon, Anthropic is still talking to high-level members of the Trump administration.
